soil_moisture_rules.recommendation: Irrigate immediately — soil moisture below 18% critical threshold.
Schedule irrigation within 24 hours — soil moisture between 18% and 25%.
No irrigation needed — soil moisture above 25%.

ndvi_trend_rules.recommendation: Potential crop stress — NDVI dropped more than 15% week-over-week, inspect field.

ndvi_absolute_rules.recommendation: Severe stress — NDVI below 0.35 for healthy-stage tomato crop, investigate immediately.
